title: Easier green dye
description: Green dye is VERY hard to get, this datapack makes it easier
body:
Green dye is VERY hard to get, this datapack makes it easier # Crafting ### First green dye recipe ![green dye recipe one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2af271cb3a397a1d81500841b7d8b2e8e7ac242a.png) ### Second green dye recipe ![Green dye recipe two](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e73c56c9674b4aa8ec3de98d35ac907b08e76dad.png) Developers: [@kc123552](https://modrinth.com/user/kc123552)
